examples: If you rap it with your knuckle, you hear the thwack of gypsum rather than the ring of cold metal.
The finger is still crooked to this day, bent at the bottom knuckle a full 45 degrees outward from his other fingers.
Kivell and Schmitt think this suggests the independent evolution of knuckle-walking behavior in the two African ape lineages.
"I think I knuckle down and focus a lot better when conditions are tough, " Webb said.
Knuckle-dragger Martin put his head round the door and growled at us to shut up.
